DESCRIPTION: A value used to enhance specific effects.
Whenever you play 5 Skill cards (default on standard difficulty), deals 3 damage to a random enemy and applies 1 Lift (triggers a number of times equal to Analysis).
Whenever you play 4 Attack cards (default on standard difficulty), deals damage to a random enemy equal to Analysis, and applies 1 Lift (triggers 4 times).
An inherent attribute of enemies, equal to 10% of their Max HP (rounded down). When Lift reaches this value, triggers Levitate.
When its stacks reach Gravity, clears all stacks and triggers Levitate.

Lose all Block and gain 20 Deconstruction. Damage taken is increased by 50%, and damage dealt is reduced by 70%. NL At the end of the turn, takes (Gravity + Lift) × 2 damage, then removes this status and clears Lift.
Lift gained is doubled. At the end of the turn, loses 1 stack.
When played, choose one effect to activate.
Whenever you gain Block, consumes an equal number of stacks to negate the Block gained.
A global field effect. Triggering a new Aspect will replace the existing one. Only 1 can exist at a time.
Aspects that lean towards providing positive buffs or combo opportunities.
Aspects accompanied by severe negative penalties or extreme risks.
Aspects with double-edged effects, or that are capable of altering fundamental mechanic rules.
